title: Nami Chooses Her Crew
description: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Nami, Luffy, Aisa. Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: The woman who went against God!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get lost from this island, demon!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And I'm not afraid to use it!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Everyone! Make your way to cloud's end!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You must escape to the blue seas!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is planning on destroy- ing this country!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Everyone who remains here will die!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is this her idea of revenge!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't you dare ridicule our God enel!

summary: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
